name: ByteChef
description: ByteChef — open-source low-code automation platform. Self-hosted alternative to Zapier/Make with visual flow designer and component SDK.

seo.title: ByteChef — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: ByteChef: ByteChef — open-source low-code automation platform. Self-hosted alternative to Zapier/Make with visual flow designer and component SDK.

when_to_use: Self-hosted Zapier/Make alternative for GDPR-sensitive workflows
Low-code automation platform embedded into SaaS products
Connecting internal tools and APIs with visual flow designer
Replacing Zapier for teams needing on-prem data processing
Building integration workflows without custom connector code

pros: Open-source Zapier alternative with active dev
Component SDK lets devs ship custom integrations
MIT-style licensing with no vendor lock-in
cons: Younger project with fewer connectors than n8n
Community still small vs Make and Zapier
Docs gaps around advanced use cases
review.verdict: Promising OSS automation platform, but n8n is still the more mature self-host choice today.
review.best_for: Teams wanting a self-hosted automation platform with custom components
review.not_for: Non-technical users or teams needing hundreds of prebuilt connectors
